prompt: Create a cinematic fantasy image of a radiant androgynous male angel descending through a sea of glowing clouds at sunrise, centered in a wide panoramic composition. The angel has an idealized athletic body, long flowing golden blond hair blowing in the light, a softly obscured or faceless face overwhelmed by divine radiance, bare chest, bare feet, and a wind-tossed white linen wrap draped around the waist and across one shoulder with long translucent fabric ribbons trailing downward. Show exactly two enormous feathered wings, one extending left and one extending right, spanning almost the full width of the frame; the feathers are layered, detailed, ivory and gold, backlit so their edges glow. The angel floats with legs together, arms open outward in a welcoming blessing pose, palms relaxed. Behind the head is an intense sunburst halo of warm golden white light, with dramatic volumetric rays streaming through towering cumulus clouds. The atmosphere is heavenly, serene, awe-inspiring and majestic, filled with tiny sparkling dust motes, soft lens flare, radiant mist, and high-contrast golden illumination. Use hyperrealistic digital painting / epic concept art style, ultra-detailed feathers, luminous skin, ethereal fabric motion, symmetrical composition, wide 21:9 aspect ratio, no text, no border, no modern objects.
